title: COLUMBIA MEMORIAL URGENT CARE - 211info
text: WARRENTON MEDICAL GROUP COLUMBIA MEMORIAL URGENT CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides treatment for minor illnesses or injuries that do not require hospitalization but need direct attention. 1639 SE Ensign Lane Suite B103 Warrenton, OR 97146 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 7 days per week 9am-6:30pm Holiday hours: 7 days per week 9am-5:30pm. Closed Thanksgiving and Christmas. (503) 338-4500 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 338-4500 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Accepts Medicaid, Medicare, and private insurance. Discounts, financial assistance, and payment plans may be available for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: Clatsop County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in Warrenton Highlands business park Services: Urgent Care Centers Other Services Offered At This Location: OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - PRIMARY AND BEHAVIORAL HEALTH If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WARRENTON MEDICAL GROUP
